title: cyperus regiomontanus var. pallens
intro: Cyperus regiomontanus var. pallens is a lesser-known variety of the Cyperus regiomontanus plant, a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine, particularly in Mexico and other parts of Latin America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like wounds and burns. In herbal preparations, Cyperus regiomontanus var. pallens can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may be used to promote healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
